content: Curiosity-driven autonomous agents equipped with intrinsic motivation mechanisms (ICM/RND) can be leveraged to actively prioritize which new memory traces to retain and prune in state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems, creating a self-sustaining memory cycle where the agent’s own curiosity drives the curation of its long-term knowledge store. This replaces hand-engineered memory retention rules with the agent’s intrinsic sense of what information is relevant to its future learning goals.
